初级.problem: 查下咱医院有多少个科室？
初级.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 科室数量 FROM departments_wards WHERE is_active = TRUE;

中级.problem: 看看哪些医生的绩效高于科室平均绩效
中级.sql: SELECT s1.staff_id, s1.staff_name, s1.performance_score, s1.department_id FROM medical_staff s1 WHERE s1.performance_score > (SELECT AVG(performance_score) FROM medical_staff s2 WHERE s2.department_id = s1.department_id);
